policy.runtimeActivationRule: A source pack is runtime-live only when it is classified as live_runtime in this catalog and contains SOURCE_PACK_READY.md.
policy.nonLiveRule: follow_up_only and reference_only packs may remain cutover-complete, but they must not be treated as active runtime truth.

packs.label: agency-agents
packs.note: Active run-scoped specialist pack normalized under explicit Forge live-runtime accounting.

packs.label: agent-orchestrator
packs.note: Follow-up-only pack with Forge-owned CLI precondition and bounded `ao status --json` host proof completed; interactive AO host surfaces are blocked until one narrower adapter target is explicitly promoted.

packs.label: arscontexta
packs.note: Live explicit-only context operator import lane for arscontexta operator seeds; does not imply full methodology/plugin runtime adoption.

packs.label: celtrix
packs.note: Retained as reference/cutover sample only; not a live Forge runtime pack.

packs.label: desloppify
packs.note: Active run-scoped quality utility prototype normalized under explicit Forge live-runtime accounting.

packs.label: impeccable
packs.note: Retained for review/process reference only; not a live Forge runtime pack.

packs.label: promptfoo
packs.note: Live bounded eval lane with callable status proven through Forge promotion.

packs.label: puppeteer
packs.note: Live bounded browser smoke lane for host UI validation; does not imply generic browser automation privileges.

packs.label: scripts
packs.note: Utility script pack retained for reference and maintenance only.

packs.label: skills-manager
packs.note: Live bounded skill-lifecycle import lane for the Skills Lifecycle Operator; does not imply desktop app runtime adoption.

packs.label: software-design-philosophy-skill
packs.note: Live explicit-only bounded design-review skill import lane; does not imply upstream installation flow or generic skill-pack runtime adoption.

packs.label: superpowers
packs.note: Live explicit-only bounded workflow operator import lane; does not imply upstream plugin, hook, or overlay runtime adoption.
